{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Jade perception
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can extend his [[Jade perception]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
